nodes.name: create_base_table.sql
nodes.summary: Creates the base table `t1` with columns `x`, `y`, `z` used to test backfill with column pruning in replication scenarios.

nodes.name: create_mv.sql
nodes.summary: Creates a materialized view that selects a subset of columns from `t1` to test column pruning during backfill replication.

nodes.name: drop.sql
nodes.summary: Drops the materialized view and base table used in the column-pruning backfill replication test.

nodes.name: insert.sql
nodes.summary: Inserts sample rows into the `t1` table to seed data for the column-pruning backfill replication test.

nodes.name: select.sql
nodes.summary: Placeholder select script for the column-pruning backfill replication test suite (empty file).
